channel.title: AI-Era Marketing Offers on
channel.description: Recent content in AI-Era Marketing Offers on

item.title: Founder Content Engine
item.description: Recurring revenue offer $5K/month Founder Content Engine Founder-led growth for technical companies that need credibility, not content sludge. I turn founder, customer, and product conversations into useful market-facing content and sales-ready proof. Monthly retainer AI-assisted production Operator-led judgment Start monthly Want me to take a look? See all offers The problem Technical founders know they should be visible, but they do not have time to turn product thinking, customer conversations, and market observations into consistent content.

item.title: Positioning + Pipeline Audit
item.description: Front-end offer $7.5K Positioning + Pipeline Audit I help technical B2B companies figure out why buyers are not converting, what is unclear, what proof is missing, and what to fix first. 10 business days Fixed fee Seed to Series B fit Buy the audit Want me to take a look? See all offers The problem Founders often know the product is strong, but the market story is vague. The homepage explains too much and proves too little.

item.title: Proof Ops Sprint
item.description: Premium differentiated offer $10K to $20K Proof Ops Sprint AI made average content cheap. Proof is now the differentiator. I help B2B companies operationalize credibility so buyers and sales teams can trust the claims being made. 2-4 week sprint Premium package Proof system buildout Buy Light Buy Heavy Want me to take a look? See all offers The problem Most technical B2B companies make claims faster than they collect proof.
